programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: After a week’s break, Formula 1 returns to the Suzuka Circuit for the opening practice session.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: The Formula 1 drivers are back out at Suzuka for the second practice session.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mercedes arrives in dominant form, while Ferrari emerges as their primary threat, and defending champions McLaren fight to salvage their season.

programme.title: Warriors vs Wests Tigers
programme.desc: Friday's exclusive double-header begins with the first-placed hosts on a nine-game winning streak against the visitors.

programme.title: Canterbury vs Newcastle
programme.desc: Super Saturday kicks off with the hosts looking to retain their undefeated record in 2026 & extend their winning streak against the visitors to four.

programme.title: Penrith vs Parramatta
programme.desc: These fierce rivals are in form heading into the 114th Western Sydney Derby.

programme.title: North Queensland vs Melbourne
programme.desc: The hosts will be buoyant after a breakthrough win, while the visitors will be stinging after blowing a 14-point lead to suffer their first loss.

programme.title: Gold Coast Titans vs St George Illawarra
programme.desc: Extra intensity for Round 4's final clash, with both teams chasing their first victory of the season.

programme.title: St George Illawarra vs North Queensland
programme.desc: Watch Round 5 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Cronulla vs Warriors
programme.desc: Watch Round 5 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Greater Western Sydney Giants
programme.desc: A fired-up Adam Kingsley will push his side to regain their opening round form as they face the Pies, fresh off the bye.

programme.title: St Kilda Saints vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Saints host the Lions in a huge clash at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs North Melbourne Kangaroos
programme.desc: It’s been ten years since North has beaten the Bombers, and rarely has there been a more important game as both clubs meet at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: Port Adelaide Power vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: Both sides are aiming for back to back wins as your Sunday Ticket begins on Fox Footy.

programme.title: Brisbane Lions vs Collingwood Magpies
programme.desc: The Lions host the Pies in Round 4.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Carlton Blues
programme.desc: The Roos and Blues meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Richmond Tigers vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: The Tigers meet the Power in Round 4.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs Gold Coast Suns
programme.desc: The Dees and Suns meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Hawthorn Hawks vs Geelong Cats
programme.desc: The Hawks and Cats close out Round 4.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Carlton Blues
programme.desc: Round 5 begins with the Blues travelling to face the Crows.

programme.title: Fremantle Dockers vs Richmond Tigers
programme.desc: The Tigers head west to face the Dockers at Optus Stadium.

programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Melbourne Demons
programme.desc: Demons captain Max Gawn plays his 250th game against the Blues at the MCG.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Crows and Dockers face off in Round 4.

programme.title: West Coast Eagles vs Sydney Swans
programme.desc: Old rivals West Coast and Sydney meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Western Bulldogs vs Essendon Bombers
programme.desc: The Dogs meet the Bombers in Round 4.

programme.title: Mavericks vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The first Melbourne derby of the season sees the Mavericks and Vixens clash at John Cain Arena.

programme.title: Sunshine Coast Lightning vs NSW Swifts
programme.desc: The Lightning and Swifts clash on the Sunshine Coast with sides coming off exciting 1 goal wins.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Adelaide Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The Firebirds are looking for their first win of the season as they host the red-hot Thunderbirds.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Giants Netball
programme.desc: The Fever search for back-to-back home wins as they host the struggling Giants at RAC Arena.
